_note: VU Geneeskunde blokkalender. RECURRING: block_starts are MM-DD and resolve automatically to the current academic year (Aug-Dec → the year starting that September; Jan-Jul → next calendar year). Each block runs until the next block's start; the last runs to year_end. year1/2/3 list subjects IN BLOCK ORDER, index-aligned to block_starts; an empty string "" means no block-subject in that slot (skipped). Order taken from the vumed.html menu (Tijmen: 'the order is in my menu'). Year 3 = minor in the first half, so its 5 subjects occupy the 5 spring blocks (the last 5 slots). Dates + order confirmed by Tijmen 2026-07-11. Subject strings must match subjects_meta.json exactly.
